"Will Kanye tweet again by April 30?" hits 79% YES with $17.8M volume across tweet markets, a top **smart money move** as traders bet heavily on his social media comeback.[4]

Iran x Israel/US Conflict Markets Heating Up | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's X predictions page shows "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?" at 35% YES and "Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire broken by...?" at 99% YES, indicating traders on X are buzzing about escalating Middle East tensions with high conviction on a broken ceasefire.[1]

signals.headline: PERU GENERAL ELECTION VOTING EXTENDED TO SECOND DAY DUE TO DISRUPTIONS; EARLY RESULTS SHOW FUJIMORI LEADING BUT RUNOFF E
signals.raw:
PERU GENERAL ELECTION VOTING EXTENDED TO SECOND DAY DUE TO DISRUPTIONS; EARLY RESULTS SHOW FUJIMORI LEADING BUT RUNOFF EXPECTED | YES | MED confidence**  
Voting in Peru's April 11-12, 2026, presidential election extended into a second day in Lima and abroad (e.g., Florida, New Jersey) after polling delays prevented thousands from voting, pushing results to at least Monday, April 14.[1][2][6][8]
